ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", $Profile.Name != "Integration User - API Only" , $Profile.Name != "Integration User", $Profile.Name !="SW Billing", $Profile.Name !="SW Billing Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Wolves", Not(ISCHANGED(Quote_Status__c)), OR( IsPickVal(PriorValue(StageName), "Closed Won"), IsPickVal(PriorValue(StageName), "Closed Lost") ), OR( IsChanged(StageName), IsChanged(ForecastCategoryName), IsChanged(Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c), IsChanged(Amount), IsChanged(CloseDate), IsChanged(Cycle_Price__c), IsChanged(Cycle__c), IsChanged(Type), IsChanged(RecordTypeId) ),
!UpdatedByNextStageFlow__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot update a closed opportunity. Please contact Sales Ops for assistance.
